NAME:
   immich-go stack - Stack duplicate and burst assets on Immich server

USAGE:
   immich-go stack [command options]

OPTIONS:
   --server value               Immich server URL
   --skip-verify-ssl            Skip SSL verification (default: false)
   --client-timeout value       Client timeout (default: 20m0s)
   --dry-run                    Perform dry-run without stacking (default: false)
   --log-level value            Log output verbosity (default: "info")
   --manage-burst value         Burst frame stacking strategy (default: "NoStack")
   --manage-raw-jpeg value      RAW+JPEG pair stacking strategy (default: "NoStack")
   --manage-heic-jpeg value     HEIC+JPEG pair stacking strategy (default: "NoStack")
